Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Calder]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Calder is the son of Rojric.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Calder's alias is an ancient craftsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Calder is the protagonist of the chapter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder has past experience with Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder is the person who pointed toward his Quartermaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder gripped a cutlass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Calder is the son of Alsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Calder is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder is a captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder is married to Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder uses a pistol and a cutlass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder is a character who can focus his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Calder leaned forward scenting weakness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Calder is a captain who is not a very good navigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Calder is the Captain of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder has been living with his mother for more than a year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder is a character who carries steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder's full name is Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder uses a saber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder is shaking and trembling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Calder is a person who has heard of the Blackwatch Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Calder is a character who observes the crater and its contents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Calder was running back to the edge of a crater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is a character who can sense despair radiating from others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder reminded himself that he belongs there.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Calder is a character who was previously involved in a trial and an arrest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Calder is a character who interacts with the Imperial Guard and Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Calder is a highly trained duelist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Calder carries a saber in his right hand and a pistol in his left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Calder jumps onto a ship's railing and launches himself into the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Calder winced in anticipation of landing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is planning to use an Elder creature from the Aion to guide a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder wears a Blackwatch coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder used his blood to bind his Intent to the boards of his raft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder has seven nails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder is wearing the Emperor’s crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder has a link to a Bellowing Horror, a Lyathatan, and the Soul Collector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder made a bargain with Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder's father is in prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder can Read a living human being's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder has a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder emerged from a concealed tunnel entrance leading to the dungeons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder is a character who visited Lucan's cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder is waiting inside a hollow boulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Calder used his blood to help create the ship The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Calder's mother helped plan the ship The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder threw the Heart of the Dead Mother into the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder wears the mark of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder possesses a weapon that can sigh contentedly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Calder is a character who has a pain in his leg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Calder arrived at the prisons just as the ground caved in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Calder spotted the red sails and bright alchemical flames on the ocean.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Calder was incapacitated by a needle in his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Calder is part of a crew that arrived at the crater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Calder is kneeling by Urzaia instead of seeking shelter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Calder possesses a pet Elderspawn.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Calder has been released unharmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Calder participated in the construction of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is a character who wondered how to approach the Capital without alerting harbor-guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is experiencing a pounding head from previous exertions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is a person who was startled to hear General Teach address him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Calder remained on the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder was in the courtyard outside the Emperor's quarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder was wearing Imperial clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder was present during the meeting with Maxeus and Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Calder is interrogating Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Calder is a Captain who intends to return for Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder is observing the defeat of an Elder wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder woke up aboard The Testament and experienced Reader's burn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder wears a red-and-gold jacket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Calder's ship is named The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Calder's ship, The Testament, has no power to give him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is an Imperial Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is soaking in a copper bathtub filled with noxious green sludge for medical recovery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is a Navigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder says Shera survived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Calder is a person who is currently trying to figure out a way to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Calder gathered the men during an escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Calder's ship was stopped by the Lyathatan's chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Calder has bright flame-colored hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Calder felt ashamed of his Izyrian ancestors who built the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder holds the rank of Emperor and Imperial Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder carries a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is planning to free Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Calder was in danger of being crushed by panicked people seeking escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Calder is the one steering The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Calder uses Intent to Read the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Calder observed the battle through a spyglass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Calder stood on the Gray Island docks during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder was mysteriously transported to a towering library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder was expelled from the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder was banished to the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder's father was executed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Calder recognized the type of ship used by the Consultants.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Calder can stop the Consultants with a word.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Calder is pursuing Shera personally now that the Veil is lifted.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Calder is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Calder has an Elder chained to his ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Calder bartered with Kelarac for the sword he wears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Calder can use his mark to Read, predict, and destroy Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine is Calder's girlfriend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Calder is the nominal head of his faction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Calder is a character who is in debt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder considered wearing the Emperor's armor but chose not to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is participating in a negotiation involving Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder's thoughts were paralyzed by overwhelming Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder can use the crown to reinforce his Intent with the Emperor's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder uses the Emperor's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder commands the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder's mind shut down due to being overwhelmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Calder is using the Optasia to absorb information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Calder decides to gaze into the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Calder is a character present in the discussion behind the barricade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Calder is sleeping in the tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder is especially sensitive to Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder has learned something that could cause the Great Elders to destroy him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Calder led the others to barricade a far wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Calder is a Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Calder intends to present himself as bait to give the Consultants an opportunity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Calder can feel the authority in the Emperor's crown through the metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder is standing on a balcony with Imperial Guards and looking out over a crowd of ten thousand people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder possesses an ember-spotted blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder carries the Emperor’s crown in a concealed pocket beneath his armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder wears Emperor's armor with a visor containing Intent that enhances sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder wields an Awakened sword that emits orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder observed Shera through the mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder's thoughts turned to Jerri as darkness closed in on him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Calder uses Intent to steer the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Calder walked away with his crew intact while Tommison and his crew died under mysterious Elder-related circumstances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Calder has a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Calder strapped a chest containing the crown to the Lyathatan’s manacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder has died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder has not fully succeeded the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder is a person Dalton Foster might look for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder's life is in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder has a sucking wound to his back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Calder is in a sitting room of an expensive Capital mansion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is shown wearing armor and a tall, spiked crown of yellowed bone in a vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — A ninety-foot golden statue of Calder stands guard over his massive tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is questioning why the Head of the Consultant’s Guild helped remove his armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is working with Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is experiencing extreme physical pain and sensation of lightning in his bones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder was restrained with cheap tin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder has a shattered chain dangling from his wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is currently unable to walk without a crutch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder's body was the vessel for Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder has a plan of his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder is not a real Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac has favored Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder refused Kelarac's offer to save him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder is the former Steward of the entire Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder planned to use an artifact left by the Emperor to get even with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder has earned fame by facing Great Elders down directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder carries the Emperor's Intent from his armor and crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Calder can communicate messages using his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Calder has had his body enhanced by Petal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Calder has a new body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder is experiencing vision loss and difficulty breathing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder is aware that the others do not know they are living on borrowed time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder possesses Calder's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder is alone on a deck with Jerri and Elder worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder's Vessel is a ship named The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder is a character who received an Awakened sword from Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder felt sorry that he let Lucan die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder sat on the throne of the Aurelian Empire as the second human being to do so.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder and the Emperor woke in the same body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac expressed a desire to keep Calder and the crew as toys.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Calder may wear the Emperor’s old clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has faced down the Handmaiden on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has seen the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has a reddish burn scar on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder received a mark from an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder's wife is one of the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder was in a room wearing the Emperor's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder's sword shines orange in the silver clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder wears a black glass visor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder is an armored man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder was the false Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Calder gave a speech at the Emperor's Stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder rushed at Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder was wounded, exhausted, and burned all over on the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder is watching the Dead Mother walk.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
